name: specnav-marketplace
description: Local marketplace for the SpecNav Claude Code lifecycle plugin suite.

plugins.name: specnav-core
plugins.description: SpecNav core runtime: router, hooks, state machine, doctor, and suite governance.

plugins.name: specnav-requirements
plugins.description: SpecNav requirements stage: foundation specs, requirements questioning, acceptance, and maps.

plugins.name: specnav-prototype
plugins.description: SpecNav prototype stage: isolated prototype code, review, verification, and handoff.

plugins.name: specnav-development
plugins.description: SpecNav development stage: scope lock, vertical slices, task ledger, and development handoff.

plugins.name: specnav-verification
plugins.description: SpecNav verification stage: six-domain evidence, traceability, receipt, and aggregate report.

plugins.name: specnav-operations
plugins.description: SpecNav operations stage: release, install/update policy, deploy, rollback, monitor, and archive.
